title: Depth Estimation and Forward Warp
interaction_flow: === PHASE 1: DA3 Model Loading ===
Caller → depth_utils: load_da3_model(da3_model_name, da3_model_path_custom, device)
depth_utils → depth_utils: load_da3_from_custom_checkpoint(ckpt_path, pretrained_path, device, strict)
depth_utils → depth_utils: _import_da3_api() → imports DepthAnything3 class from vendored submodule
depth_utils → depth_utils: _resolve_da3_local_model_name(pretrained_path) → checks MODEL_REGISTRY, returns local config name
depth_utils → DepthAnything3: DepthAnything3(model_name=local_model_name) → instantiate architecture
depth_utils → torch: torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location='cpu') → checkpoint dict
depth_utils → depth_utils: extract state_dict (handles 'module'/'model' keys, strips 'model.' prefix)
depth_utils → DepthAnything3: model.model.load_state_dict(converted, strict=strict)
depth_utils → DepthAnything3: model.to(device); model.eval()
depth_utils → Caller: return da3_model
=== PHASE 2: DA3 Depth Prediction (Temporal Window) ===
Caller → _predict_da3_depth_window(da3_model, history_frames[B,C,T,H,W], start_index, abs_last_idx, cam_w2c, intrinsics, frame_interval, max_history_frames)
_predict_da3_depth_window → _predict_da3_depth_window: build selected_frames list: abs_last_idx, abs_last_idx-N, abs_last_idx-2N, ... (up to max_history_frames, >= 0)
_predict_da3_depth_window → _predict_da3_depth_window: for each selected frame f: extract frame_chw = history_frames[0,:,start_index+f], convert [-1,1]→uint8, collect extrinsics/intrinsics
_predict_da3_depth_window → DepthAnything3: da3_model.inference(image=images[uint8], extrinsics=np[N,4,4], intrinsics=np[N,3,3], align_to_input_extrinsics=True, infer_gs=False, process_res, ...)
_predict_da3_depth_window → Caller: return {frame_indices: selected_frames, prediction: prediction_dict}
=== PHASE 3: Single-Frame Forward Warp (depth1 path) ===
Caller → forward_warp(frame1[b,3,h,w], mask1[b,1,h,w], depth1[b,1,h,w], transformation1[b,4,4], transformation2[b,4,4], intrinsic1[b,3,3], intrinsic2[b,3,3])
forward_warp → forward_warp: nan_to_num + clamp depth1 to [0, 1e4]
forward_warp → compute_transformed_points(depth1, transformation1, transformation2, intrinsic1, is_depth, intrinsic2)
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: relative_transform = transformation2 @ inv(transformation1)
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: build pixel grid [x2d, y2d, 1] → pos_vectors_homo[1,h,w,3,1]
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: unnormalized_pos = K1_inv @ pos_vectors_homo  (backproject)
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: world_points = depth * unnormalized_pos (is_depth=True) OR depth * normalized_direction (is_depth=False)
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: world_points_homo = [world_points; 1], trans_world = relative_transform @ world_points_homo
compute_transformed_points → compute_transformed_points: trans_norm_points = K2 @ trans_world[..., :3]  (project to target image plane)
compute_transformed_points → forward_warp: return trans_norm_points[b,h,w,3,1]
forward_warp → forward_warp: mask out pixels with Z<=0; trans_coordinates = trans_norm_points[..,:2] / Z
forward_warp → forward_warp: flow12 = trans_coordinates.permute(0,3,1,2) - create_grid(b,h,w)
forward_warp → forward_warp: (optional) compute camera_ray filtering: rotate normals to target space, dot product with camera rays → binary mask
forward_warp → bilinear_splatting(frame1, mask1, trans_depth1, flow12, None, is_image)
bilinear_splatting → bilinear_splatting: trans_pos = flow12 + grid; compute floor/ceil neighbor positions
bilinear_splatting → bilinear_splatting: compute proximity weights NW/NE/SW/SE (bilinear interpolation coefficients)
bilinear_splatting → bilinear_splatting: depth_weights = exp(log1p(depth)/max * depth_weight_scale) — closer pixels get higher weight
bilinear_splatting → bilinear_splatting: scatter (index_put_ accumulate=True) weighted frame values to padded output[b, h+2, w+2, c]
bilinear_splatting → bilinear_splatting: normalize by accumulated weights; clip to [-1,1] if is_image; mask = weights>0
bilinear_splatting → forward_warp: return (warped_frame2[b,c,h,w], mask2[b,1,h,w])
forward_warp → forward_warp: (if render_depth) bilinear_splatting(trans_depth1, ...) → warped_depth2
forward_warp → forward_warp: (if foreground_masking) points_to_mesh → ray_triangle_intersection (NVIDIA Warp) → occlusion mask update
forward_warp → Caller: return (warped_frame2, mask2, warped_depth2, flow12)
=== PHASE 4: Multi-Frame Forward Warp (Lyra-2 path) ===
Caller → forward_warp_multiframes(frame1[b,v,3,h,w], mask1, depth1[b,v,1,h,w], transformation1[b,v,4,4], transformation2[b,4,4], intrinsic1[b,v,3,3], intrinsic2[b,3,3])
forward_warp_multiframes → forward_warp_multiframes: nan/clamp depth; optional reliable_depth_mask_range_batch continuity cleaning
forward_warp_multiframes → unproject_points(depth_flat[(b*v),1,h,w], w2c_flat, K_flat) → world_pts_flat[(b*v),h,w,3]
forward_warp_multiframes → project_points(world_points1[(b*v),h,w,3], transformation2_tiled, intrinsic2_tiled) → trans_points1
forward_warp_multiframes → forward_warp_multiframes: compute flow12 = trans_coordinates - grid
forward_warp_multiframes → bilinear_splatting(frame1_flat, mask1_flat, trans_depth1, flow12, n_views=v) → (warped_frame2, mask2)
forward_warp_multiframes → Caller: return (warped_frame2, mask2, warped_depth2, flow12)
key_relationships: load_da3_model delegates_to load_da3_from_custom_checkpoint (when custom ckpt path provided)
load_da3_from_custom_checkpoint depends_on _import_da3_api (lazy import, clears sys.modules stale keys)
load_da3_from_custom_checkpoint depends_on _resolve_da3_local_model_name (maps HuggingFace id to local MODEL_REGISTRY key)
forward_warp optionally depends_on points_to_mesh + ray_triangle_intersection (foreground occlusion masking via NVIDIA Warp)
forward_warp_multiframes depends_on unproject_points (pinhole or ftheta model backprojection)
forward_warp_multiframes depends_on bilinear_splatting (n_views>1 sums across views)
compute_transformed_points uses inverse_with_conversion (float32 cast for numerical stability)

key_data_shapes.history_frames: [B=1, C=3, T, H, W] float32 in [-1,1]
key_data_shapes.trans_norm_points: (b, h, w, 3, 1) projected homogeneous coords in target cam
key_data_shapes.flow12: (b, 2, h, w) optical flow to target view

important_notes: DA3 = DepthAnything3; loaded from vendored submodule at depth_anything_3/src/; lazy-imported with sys.path manipulation
Custom checkpoint loading strips 'model.' prefix and handles 'module'/'model' checkpoint keys; falls back to from_pretrained if strict=False and keys missing
_predict_da3_depth_window selects up to max_history_frames frames stepping backwards by frame_interval; optionally adds AR chunk boundary frames
forward_warp supports two 3D point sources: (a) depth1+transformation1+intrinsic1 via compute_transformed_points, or (b) precomputed world_points1 via project_points
bilinear_splatting uses scatter/accumulate (index_put_) not gather — it is a forward/push warp, not backward warp
Depth weighting in bilinear_splatting: weight inversely proportional to log-depth (foreground pixels override background)
foreground_masking uses NVIDIA Warp ray-triangle intersection against a mesh built from target-space camera points
forward_warp_multiframes (Lyra-2) supports ftheta (fisheye) lens model in unproject_points; Lyra-1 version is pinhole only
Two parallel implementations exist: Lyra-1 (cosmos_predict1/diffusion/inference/) for single-view, Lyra-2 (lyra_2/_src/datasets/) for multi-view with einops rearrange
